sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 델 테크놀로지스는 AI 서버 수요 급증에 힘입어 1분기 매출 438억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: AI 서버 수요의 강력한 모멘텀으로 인해 1분기 매출 438억 달러, 희석 주당순이익(EPS) 5.24달러로 모두 사상 최대치를 기록했습니다.
AI 서버 시장의 성장세를 반영하여 연간 AI 서버 매출 전망치를 600억 달러로 상향 조정하고, 연간 전체 매출 가이던스도 1,670억 달러로 높였습니다.

businessChanges.text: 인프라 솔루션 그룹(ISG) 부문은 전년 대비 181% 성장한 290억 달러의 매출을 기록하며 실적 성장을 견인했습니다.
주주 가치 제고를 위해 1분기 중 자사주 매입 및 배당을 통해 총 21억 달러를 주주에게 환원했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 영업활동 현금흐름은 41억 달러로 사상 최대치를 달성했습니다.
클라이언트 솔루션 그룹(CSG) 매출은 146억 달러로 전년 대비 17% 증가했습니다.
비일반회계기준(Non-GAAP) 희석 주당순이익은 4.86달러로 전년 대비 214% 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 상향 조정된 연간 AI 서버 매출 전망치 600억 달러가 실제 분기별 실적에서 지속적으로 달성 가능한지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991earnings8kq1fy27.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Dell Technologies Delivers First Quarter Fiscal 2027 Financial Results ROUND ROCK, Texas — May 28, 2026 — Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) announces financial results for its fiscal 2027 first quarter and provides guidance for its fiscal 2027 second quarter and full year. First-Quarter Summary • Record revenue of $43.8 billion, up 88% year over year • Record diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $5.24, up 282% year over year, and record non-GAAP diluted EPS of $4.86, up 214% • Record first-quarter cash flow from operations of $4.1 billion “Our record Q1 performance reflects strong in-quarter demand, as well as our pace of innovation across the full stack of PCs, compute and storage,” said Jeff Clarke, vice chairman and chief op  Normalized numeric aliases: $43.8 billion = 438억 달러; $4.1 billion = 41억 달러; $24.4 billion = 244억 달러; $43.8 = 43.8달러; $5.24 = 5.24달러; $4.86 = 4.86달러; $4.1 = 4.1달러; $24.4 = 24.4달러; $16.1 = 16.1달러.

illion of AI server revenue. We’re increasing our AI server revenue expectations for FY27 to $60 billion, which only goes to show the AI opportunity shows no signs of slowing.” “Execution was exceptionally strong across the business – from supply chain to sales to pricing – driving record revenue of $43.8 billion, record EPS, record Q1 cash flow of $4.1 billion and continued strong shareholder returns of $2.1 billion,” said David Kennedy, chief financial officer, Dell Technologies. “We entered FY27 with clear momentum, raising our full-year revenue outlook to $167 billion at the midpoint, up nearly 50% year over year.” Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG) • Record revenue: $29.0 billion, up 181% year over year •   Normalized numeric aliases: $60 billion = 600억 달러; $43.8 billion = 438억 달러; $4.1 billion = 41억 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $167 billion = 1,670억 달러; $29.0 billion = 290억 달러; $16.1 billion = 161억 달러; $8.5 billion = 85억 달러; $60 = 60달러; $43.8 = 43.8달러; $4.1 = 4.1달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러.

-quarter Storage revenue: $4.3 billion, up 8% year over year • Record operating income: $3.1 billion, up 206% year over year Client Solutions Group (CSG) • Revenue: $14.6 billion, up 17% year over year • Record Commercial Client revenue: $13.0 billion, up 18% year over year • Consumer revenue: $1.6 billion, up 9% year over year • Record operating income: $1.2 billion, up 79% year over year Capital Return Dell Technologies returned $2.1 billion to shareholders in the first quarter through share repurchases and dividends. 1 Guidance Summary • Second-quarter FY27 revenue expected between $44.0 billion and $45.0 billion, up 49% year over year at the midpoint of $44.5 billion • Second-  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.3 billion = 43억 달러; $3.1 billion = 31억 달러; $14.6 billion = 146억 달러; $13.0 billion = 130억 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $44.0 billion = 440억 달러; $45.0 billion = 450억 달러; $44.5 billion = 445억 달러; $165.0 billion = 1,650억 달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러.

and $169.0 billion, up 47% year over year at the midpoint of $167.0 billion • Full-year AI-Optimized Servers revenue expected to be roughly $60 billion, up 144% year over year • Full-year FY27 GAAP diluted EPS expected to be $17.31 at the midpoint, up 99% year over year, and non-GAAP diluted EPS to be $17.90 at the midpoint, up 74% 2 First Quarter Fiscal 2027 Financial Results Three Months Ended May 1, 2026 May 2, 2025 Change (in millions, except per share amounts and percentages; unaudited) Net revenue $ 43,842 $ 23,378 88% Operating income $ 3,656 $ 1,165 214% Net income $ 3,438 $ 965 256% Change in cash from operating activities $ 4,081 $ 2,796 46% Earnings per share — diluted $ 5.24 $ 1.37 282% Non-GAAP operating income $ 4,235 $ 1,666 154% Non-GAAP net income $ 3,190 $ 1,086 194% Adjusted fre  Normalized numeric aliases: $169.0 billion = 1,690억 달러; $167.0 billion = 1,670억 달러; $60 billion = 600억 달러; $169.0 = 169.0달러; $167.0 = 167.0달러; $60 = 60달러; $17.31 = 17.31달러; $17.90 = 17.90달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
